tools.name: get_daily_briefing
tools.description: Today's aggregate AI industry briefing: top stories, emerging signals, new entrants, and regulation updates, distilled from HN/Reddit and official legislative sources. A curated once-daily synthesis — for raw item-level updates since your last check, use get_new_since instead. Optionally pass any pa

tools.name: get_regulation_updates
tools.description: Current AI legislation headlines across the US Congress, UK Parliament, and EU, with their legislative stage (proposed / committee / floor action / passed / implementation).

tools.name: get_china_signal
tools.description: Shortcut for get_region_signal with region "china": the current China & East-Asia AI signal (Qwen, DeepSeek, Zhipu, Moonshot, ModelScope, and more) that Western feeds often miss — ranked by momentum. Prefer get_region_signal if you may query more than one region.

tools.name: get_region_signal
tools.description: The current AI signal for a region (china, eu, or south-america) — recent, relevance-scored items on that region's models, labs, and analysis, ranked by momentum. The canonical regional tool; get_china_signal is a preset of this with region "china". Returns titles, sources, and links.

tools.name: get_topic_signal
tools.description: The current AI signal for a topic — recent, relevance-scored items tagged with that topic, ranked by momentum. Like get_region_signal but sliced by subject instead of geography.

tools.name: search_news
tools.description: Quick teaser search over recent AI news: returns the top 3 matching titles with links. Full-text search with bodies, filters, and history requires a Horizon subscription.

tools.name: get_new_since
tools.description: Incremental poll: raw item-level AI news added since a cursor, oldest→newest, with a nextCursor for your next call — use this for "what's new since I last checked"; for the curated once-daily synthesis use get_daily_briefing. Omit cursor for the latest items plus a cursor to start polling from. Titl

tools.name: get_related
tools.description: Semantic 'more like this': given an item id (from get_new_since, search_news, or the feed), returns the most similar recent items by embedding similarity. Titles, sources, similarity scores, links.

tools.name: list_sources
tools.description: Describe what Horizon covers: ingestion sources with their source= filter values, the regional lenses (region= / dedicated tools), and how to filter. Call this to understand the corpus before querying.

tools.name: ask_horizon
tools.description: Ask a natural-language question about recent AI developments and get a synthesized, cited answer drawn only from Horizon's corpus — one call instead of search-then-read. Requires a Horizon API key: send it as 'Authorization: Bearer hzn_live_...' on your MCP requests (mint one at /api-keys).

tools.name: get_trends
tools.description: The week's rising entities in AI: the companies, models, and people whose mentions accelerated most over the last 7 days versus the prior week — momentum, not raw volume. A Horizon Pro intelligence view; requires a Pro-plan API key ('Authorization: Bearer hzn_live_...', mint one at /api-keys).

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "ask_horizon" references sensitive artifacts (authorization, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Ask a natural-language question about recent AI developments and get a synthesized, cited answer drawn only from Horizon's corpus — one call instead of search-t…

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "get_trends" references sensitive artifacts (authorization, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: The week's rising entities in AI: the companies, models, and people whose mentions accelerated most over the last 7 days versus the prior week — momentum, not r…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_china_signal, get_related · Private data: ask_horizon, get_trends · Public sink: ask_horizon.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_china_signal, get_related · Private data: ask_horizon, get_trends · Public sink: ask_horizon

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
